events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Atlanta Falcons

headlines.description: — Tom Brady and Rob Gronkowski teamed up for more history Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dynamic duo: Brady, Gronk lead Bucs past Falcons 30-17

headlines.description: — Kyler Murray was in prime position following an interception on the game's opening possession. He fumbled his first snap.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murray throws for 2 TDs, runs for 2 as Cardinals beat Bears

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Cincinnati Bengals

headlines.description: — Justin Herbert and the Los Angeles Chargers know how to bounce back after a tough stretch.
headlines.shortLinkText: Up-and-down Chargers hold off Bengals for 41-22 victory

headlines.description: — Jared Goff dropped back, looked left and let the football loose that Amon-Ra St. Brown squeezed tight as he sat in the end zone.
headlines.shortLinkText: Winless no more: Lions top Vikes 29-27 for 1st W in Week 13

events.name: New York Giants at Miami Dolphins

headlines.description: — It was third-and-goal and Tua Tagovailoa was rolling left, waiting for someone to get open. The play looked as if it was falling apart, until he saw Isaiah Ford create a sliver of space for himself near the side of the end zone.
headlines.shortLinkText: Streak continues: Tua, Dolphins hold off Giants, win 20-9

events.name: Philadelphia Eagles at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Gardner Minshew stepped into the huddle for Philadelphia, kept things light — as he always does — and led the clock-eating Eagles on seven straight scoring drives.
headlines.shortLinkText: Minshew steps in, Eagles score on 1st 7 drives to beat Jets

headlines.description: — Darius Leonard and the Indianapolis Colts defense had one goal entering Sunday's game against the Houston Texans.
headlines.shortLinkText: Taylor's two-TD day helps Colts rout woeful Texans 31-0

headlines.description: — Brian Johnson made quite the first impression on his new Washington teammates.
headlines.shortLinkText: Washington rallies for 4th straight win, 17-15 over Raiders

events.name: Jacksonville Jaguars at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — The Jacksonville Jaguars were the cure for just about everything that ailed the Los Angeles Rams throughout November.
headlines.shortLinkText: LA Rams snap 3-game skid, roll over Jacksonville 37-7

headlines.description: — John Harbaugh went for the win, and it didn't work out for the Baltimore Ravens.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gamble doesn't pay off for Ravens in loss to Steelers

headlines.description: — For all the late-game mistakes and missed opportunities throughout their disappointing season, the Seattle Seahawks continue to believe there is something worth playing for.
headlines.shortLinkText: Seahawks hold on late for wild 30-23 win over 49ers

events.name: Denver Broncos at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The Chiefs' Andy Reid is an offensive-minded coach to his core, so the Kansas City defense must have done something special against the Denver Broncos on Sunday night for him to call its performance “beautiful.”
headlines.shortLinkText: Chiefs keep AFC West lead with 22-9 victory over Broncos
